creator: david@trucs.org
text:
Hey,

I tried the patch on FreeBSD 6.2 (i386) but I noticed that 
multimedia/ffmpeg-devel is optional (enabled by default):
checking for FFMPEG... gnome-config: not found
no
configure: error: Couldn't find ffmpeg. You might need to install the 
libavcodec-dev package.

But it doesn't build with ffmpeg:
mkdir .libs
cc -O -pipe -march=athlon-xp -o .libs/swfplay -pthread -Wl,--rpath 
-Wl,/usr/local/lib -pthread -pthread -Wl,--rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib 
swfplay-swfdec_slow_loader.o swfplay-swfplay.o  -L/usr/local/lib 
-L/usr/X11R6/lib ../libswfdec-gtk/.libs/libswfdec-gtk-0.4.so 
/usr/ports/graphics/swfdec/work/swfdec-0.4.4/libswfdec/.libs/libswfdec-0.4.so 
../libswfdec/.libs/libswfdec-0.4.so /usr/local/lib/liboil-0.3.so 
/usr/local/lib/libmad.so -lavcodec /usr/local/lib/liba52.so -ldjbfft 
/usr/local/lib/libmp3lame.so -lxvidcore /usr/local/lib/libvorbisenc.so 
-lavutil /usr/local/lib/libvorbis.so /usr/local/lib/libogg.so 
/usr/local/lib/libgtk-x11-2.0.so /usr/local/lib/libgdk-x11-2.0.so 
-lXrandr -lXi -lXinerama /usr/local/lib/libatk-1.0.so 
/usr/local/lib/libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so /usr/local/lib/libpangocairo-1.0.so 
-lXcursor -lXfixes /usr/local/lib/libcairo.so -pthread -lpng -lSM -lICE 
/usr/local/lib/libpangoft2-1.0.so /usr/X11R6/lib/libfontconfig.so 
/usr/local/lib/libexpat.so /usr/local/lib/libfreetype.so -lz 
/usr/local/lib/libpango-1.0.so -lm -lXrender -lX11 -lXext 
/usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so /usr/local/lib/libgmodule-2.0.so 
/usr/local/lib/libglib-2.0.so /usr/local/lib/libintl.so 
/usr/local/lib/libiconv.so -Wl,--rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -Wl,--rpath 
-Wl,/usr/X11R6/lib
/usr/ports/graphics/swfdec/work/swfdec-0.4.4/libswfdec/.libs/libswfdec-0.4.so: 
undefined reference to `img_convert'
*** Error code 1

David
